(CSE: QQQ) (OTCQB: QQCMF) (FSE: D910) (the "Company" or "Questcorp") is pleased to announce that drilling has commenced on its La Union Project in northwest Sonora, Mexico. Riverside Resources and Questcorp Announce Commencement of Drilling at Union Project, Sonora, Mexico Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - August 6, 2025) - Riverside Resources Inc. (TSXV: RRI) (OTCQB: RVSDF) (FSE: 5YY) ("Riverside" or the "Company") , is pleased to announce that drilling has commenced at the Union Project in northwest Sonora, Mexico. This work is being carried out in partnership with Questcorp Mining Inc. (CSE: QQQ), which is earning into the project through an option agreement from Riverside (press release, May 6, 2025).
